name: board_base
full_prompt: top-down view of a vast weathered dark grey stone table surface, subtle cracked slate tiles, faint black watercolor stains, very dark and quiet, hand-drawn dark fantasy board game illustration, bold black ink outlines, muted desaturated colors, rough watercolor texture shading, grim storybook style, no text, no characters, no objects
composition_notes: Full-bleed backdrop (M1). Must stay VERY quiet and dark — everything else layers on top. Even texture, no focal points, corners slightly darker (vignette).

name: board_playmat_center
full_prompt: ornate rectangular stone play mat inlaid into a dark slate table, carved weathered grey stone border with dark green thorny vines creeping over the corners, interior is a plain darker slate surface crossed by two faint horizontal recessed bands where card rows sit, faint octagonal inlay at the very center between the bands, top-down view, hand-drawn dark fantasy board game illustration, bold black ink outlines, muted desaturated colors, rough watercolor texture shading, grim storybook style, no text, no characters
composition_notes: M2 (swap per aspect pair later). Decorated BORDER only — interior must be flat and quiet: ONE unit row of 6 sockets per side overlays the two bands (champion fights in-row). Center may hint the octagon emblem, faint, contrast kept low.

name: board_rail_side
full_prompt: vertical weathered stone rail shelf at the edge of a dark slate table, carved recesses sized for stacks of cards, thin dark green vine trim along the outer edge, top-down view, hand-drawn dark fantasy board game illustration, bold black ink outlines, muted desaturated colors, rough watercolor texture shading, grim storybook style, no text, no characters
composition_notes: M3, generate once and mirror for the left/right rails. Recesses read as deck / discard / consumed wells; keep them empty and even. Outer edge darker so it blends into board_base.
